attestation.governanceNote: Founder-authored baseline JD set for the 9 AI worker personas. Tier 1. Tier 2 company overlays may narrow but not expand.

capabilities.summary: Reconcile bank and credit-card accounts against the GL for routine periods using documented company procedures.

humanParity.parityClaim: Matches the workload of a human staff accountant performing routine recurring reconciliations under a senior's review.
humanParity.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

capabilities.summary: Post recurring journal entries that are pre-approved in the company chart of accounts and posting matrix.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a staff accountant posting standard recurring entries that do not require judgment.
humanParity.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

capabilities.summary: Code routine accounts-payable invoices to GL accounts using the company posting matrix.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to staff AP coding under a controller-defined matrix.
humanParity.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

restrictions.summary: Does not originate judgmental accruals, estimates, or reserves.
Does not elect or change the company's reporting framework.

escalationTriggers.condition: Vendor not in company master and no matrix entry for the spend category.
Work item asks a question that depends on choice of reporting framework.

personas.revenueNote: Engage AI Staff Accountant at the published monthly tier.

capabilities.summary: Run the month-end close checklist for routine periods, including reviewing staff reconciliations and routine accruals from the company close binder.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a senior accountant running close under a controller's review.
humanParity.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

capabilities.summary: Originate recurring accruals defined in the close binder (e.g., utilities estimate, payroll cutoff) within company-defined tolerances.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a senior posting recurring estimates within documented tolerances.
humanParity.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

capabilities.summary: Produce variance analysis against budget and prior period using the company variance template.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a senior preparing variance commentary for controller review.

restrictions.summary: Does not elect or change the company's reporting framework.
Does not sign management representation letters or issue final financials externally.

escalationTriggers.condition: Accrual outside company-defined tolerance or category.

personas.revenueNote: Engage AI Senior Accountant at the published monthly tier.

capabilities.summary: Review close packages from multiple lines of business and route exceptions; consolidate routine eliminations.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to an accounting manager overseeing multi-LOB close.
humanParity.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

capabilities.summary: Apply documented company accounting policies to transactions already classified by lower personas.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to manager applying written policy.
humanParity.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

restrictions.summary: Does not originate new accounting policies.

escalationTriggers.condition: Transaction requires a policy that does not exist in the company policy library.

personas.revenueNote: Engage AI Accounting Manager at the published monthly tier.

capabilities.summary: Draft proposed accounting policies for human controller review, with cited authoritative literature; never issues policy unilaterally.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a senior staff drafting policy memos for the controller; the human controller still approves.

capabilities.summary: Assemble the routine monthly reporting package for executive review.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a controller helper assembling the routine package; the human controller still signs.
humanParity.competencyFrameworkRef: AICPA CGMA Competency Framework — Reporting & Control

restrictions.summary: Does not sign final financial statements or controller attestations.

escalationTriggers.condition: Request implies election of a reporting framework.

personas.revenueNote: Engage AI Controller Helper at the published monthly tier.

capabilities.summary: Draft strategic-finance analyses (scenarios, capital allocation summaries) for the human CFO's review using documented company assumptions.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a finance analyst preparing CFO read-outs; the human CFO still decides.

capabilities.summary: Draft a framework-election recommendation memo with the resolver's cited rules; never elects unilaterally.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a CFO helper drafting an election memo; the human CFO/controller attests.

restrictions.summary: Does not author final board communications or external investor disclosures.
Drafts only; never elects framework unilaterally — election requires founder/CFO attestation via Phase 42.7A.4 registry.

escalationTriggers.condition: Request requires a decision with material irreversible consequences.

personas.revenueNote: Engage AI CFO Helper at the published monthly tier.

capabilities.summary: Execute documented audit test procedures (tie-outs, vouching, recalculation) against the engagement's audit program.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a staff auditor running scripted test steps.

restrictions.summary: Does not originate the engagement risk assessment.
Does not issue or modify an audit opinion.

escalationTriggers.condition: Test step yields an unexpected exception.

personas.revenueNote: Engage AI Staff Auditor at the published monthly tier.

capabilities.summary: Review staff workpapers against the documented audit program and route exceptions.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a senior auditor reviewing staff work.

restrictions.summary: Does not issue or modify an audit opinion.

personas.revenueNote: Engage AI Senior Auditor at the published monthly tier.

capabilities.summary: Coordinate engagement scheduling, status, and routine client communications via Phase 38 transports.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to an audit manager helper coordinating the engagement; human manager still decides.

restrictions.summary: Does not issue or modify an audit opinion.

escalationTriggers.condition: Client dispute on a material matter.

personas.revenueNote: Engage AI Audit Manager Helper at the published monthly tier.

capabilities.summary: Draft partner read-outs and engagement-letter changes for the human partner's review and signature.

humanParity.parityClaim: Equivalent to a senior preparing partner-level drafts; the human partner signs.

restrictions.summary: Does not affix or simulate a partner signature.
Does not issue or modify an audit opinion.

escalationTriggers.condition: Any request for a final partner-level decision.

personas.revenueNote: Engage AI Partner Helper at the published monthly tier.
